Aggregate: A consistency and ownership boundary manipulated through a repository.
DTO: A transport representation used at the Firestore boundary.
Entry: The canonical record of one viewing memory.
Local-first: An architecture in which useful personal state is committed locally before remote synchronization.
Offline-first: A behavior contract that explicitly defines operations available without network connectivity.
Pending Action: A durable record of remote intent awaiting synchronization.
QuickPick: An explainable recommendation that returns one thoughtful choice.
Repository: The application-facing owner of aggregate data policy.
Tombstone: A durable deletion marker preventing remote resurrection.
Wire Contract: The stable field, enum, ID, and timestamp semantics shared by platform clients and Firebase.
